name: hiremind
description: RecruitAI / HireMind — Full-stack AI Interview Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n CLIENT,SERVER,AI -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.install:all: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ../ai_service && pip install -r requirements.txt
